issue_title: An error occurs immediately after executing the agent that calls external experts when it is first released.
issue_body_preview:
### Self Checks

- [x] This is only for bug report, if you would like to ask a question, please head to [Discussions](https://github.com/orgs/xpert-ai/discussions/categories/general).
- [x] I have searched for existing issues [search for existing issues](https://github.com/xpert-ai/xpert/issues), in
test_description_zh: 首次发布包含调用外部专家的 Agent 后，立即执行该 Agent，观察执行过程和结果是否正常显示。
expected_result_zh: Agent 执行后不应出现错误提示，调用外部专家的流程应正常完成，执行结果应正确展示在界面上。
